scripts.build:lambda: rm -rf built && docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --provenance=false -o built -f Build-Lambda.Dockerfile .
scripts.deploy:lambda: cd ../infra/local && tflocal init && tflocal apply --auto-approve && tflocal output > ../../frontend/.env
scripts.build-deploy:lambda: npm run build:lambda && npm run deploy:lambda && npm run rebuild-frontend
